THESORCERESSMOD-STRIKE_SORCERESS.title: Strike
THESORCERESSMOD-DEFEND_SORCERESS.title: Defend
THESORCERESSMOD-ETHEREAL_SIDESTEP.title: Eldritch Sidestep
THESORCERESSMOD-EXPLOSIVE_PYRE.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
ALL enemies [gold]Prime[/gold] {PrimedPower:diff()}.
Next turn, ALL enemies [gold]Prime[/gold] the same amount.
THESORCERESSMOD-EXPLOSIVE_PYRE.title: Explosive Pyre
THESORCERESSMOD-RETURNING_DAGGER.title: Returning Dagger
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOW_SNEAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Don't lose [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold] after playing this card.
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOW_SNEAK.title: Shadow Sneak
THESORCERESSMOD-SLY_FLOURISH.title: Sly Flourish
THESORCERESSMOD-DISTRACTING_SHOT.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reset the costs of your [gold]Sleights[/gold] this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-DISTRACTING_SHOT.title: Distracting Shot
THESORCERESSMOD-MIND_SHADOWS.title: Mind Shadows
THESORCERESSMOD-MAKE_AN_IMPRESSION.descr:
Gain {CharismaPower:diff()} [gold]Charisma[/gold].
Choose a card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and move it to the top.
THESORCERESSMOD-MAKE_AN_IMPRESSION.title: Make an Impression
THESORCERESSMOD-GLOAMING_CUT.title: Gloaming Cut
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_FEINT.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Punish+|Two-Weapon Punish}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_FEINT.title: Two-Weapon Feint
THESORCERESSMOD-HELLFIRE_STRIKE.title: Hellfire Strike
THESORCERESSMOD-FLAME_SPIRAL.title: Flame Spiral
THESORCERESSMOD-INFILTRATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If you have [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold], gain {CharismaPower:diff()} [gold]Charisma[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-INFILTRATE.title: Infiltrate
THESORCERESSMOD-ENSORCELLED_BLADE.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you play a [gold]Sorcery[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
THESORCERESSMOD-ENSORCELLED_BLADE.title: Ensorcelled Blade
THESORCERESSMOD-TRICK_STRIKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and {IfUpgraded:show:place {Cards:plural:it|them} on top of|shuffle {Cards:plural:it|them} into} your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TRICK_STRIKE.title: Trick Strike
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELISTS_DANCE.title: Duelist's Dance
THESORCERESSMOD-SUDDEN_SCALES.descriptio:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain the same amount of [gold]Block[/gold] the next time you're attacked.
THESORCERESSMOD-SUDDEN_SCALES.title: Sudden Scales
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_PARRY.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] twice.
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Riposte+|Two-Weapon Riposte}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_PARRY.title: Two-Weapon Parry
THESORCERESSMOD-EMBER.title: Ember
THESORCERESSMOD-NIMBLE_ROLL.title: Nimble Roll
THESORCERESSMOD-DEADLY_POSITIONING.title: Deadly Positioning
THESORCERESSMOD-PALM.description:
Draw 1 card.
Discard 1 card. Reduce its cost to 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} until played.
THESORCERESSMOD-PALM.title: Palm
THESORCERESSMOD-PREEN.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.
At the end of this turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] up to 1 card.
THESORCERESSMOD-PREEN.title: Preen
THESORCERESSMOD-BLINK.title: Blink
THESORCERESSMOD-ARCING_FIRE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If this kills an enemy, play it again.
THESORCERESSMOD-ARCING_FIRE.title: Arcing Fire
THESORCERESSMOD-SPARK_FORM.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:ALL enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.|A random enemy loses {Damage:diff()} HP.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to them.}
Repeat X times.
THESORCERESSMOD-SPARK_FORM.title: Spark Form
THESORCERESSMOD-CHAOS_BOLT.description:
Enemy loses {Damage:diff()} HP.
Randomly apply [gold]Weak[/gold] or [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] {Debuff:diff()} times.
Apply Weak or Vulnerable once more for every 2 [gold]Charisma[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-CHAOS_BOLT.title: Chaos Bolt
THESORCERESSMOD-ACROBATS_TRICK.title: Acrobat's Trick
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_SORCERY.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies twice.
Next turn, add [gold]Two-Weapon Burst[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_SORCERY.title: Two-Weapon Sorcery
THESORCERESSMOD-UNKINDNESS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If you have [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold], deal double damage.
THESORCERESSMOD-UNKINDNESS.title: Unkindness
THESORCERESSMOD-CANDLELIGHT.title: Candlelight
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_FIGHTING.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Combination+|Two-Weapon Combination}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-LIGHTNING_DAGGERS.descri:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage if you have [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-LIGHTNING_DAGGERS.title: Lightning Daggers
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELISTS_FLURRY.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
If you have [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELISTS_FLURRY.title: Duelist's Flurry
THESORCERESSMOD-COMBAT_OPPORTUNIST.title: Low Slash
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_RIPOSTE.descr:
Can only be played if the enemy intends to attack.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_RIPOSTE.title: Two-Weapon Riposte
THESORCERESSMOD-KINGSLAYER.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy with the most HP.
THESORCERESSMOD-KINGSLAYER.title: Kingslayer
THESORCERESSMOD-PRESS_THE_ADVANTAGE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Hits an additional time for each unique debuff on the enemy.
THESORCERESSMOD-A_THOUSAND_MASKS.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each time you've gained [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold] this combat.{InCombat:
{AdvantageCount:plural:Hit|Hits} {AdvantageCount:diff()} {AdvantageCount:plural:time|times}.|}
THESORCERESSMOD-A_THOUSAND_MASKS.title: A Thousand Masks
THESORCERESSMOD-HELLFIRE_SOUL.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {Exhaust:diff()} random cards in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
Costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} less for each card that will be [gold]Exhausted[/gold]. Cost cannot be overridden.
THESORCERESSMOD-HELLFIRE_SOUL.title: Hellfire Soul
THESORCERESSMOD-FEINTING_FLURRY.descript:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.
Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Sleight[/gold] already played this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-FEINTING_FLURRY.title: Feinting Finale
THESORCERESSMOD-CREATE_A_DIVERSION.title: Create a Diversion
THESORCERESSMOD-BON_MOT.description:
Gain {CharismaPower:diff()} [gold]Charisma[/gold] this turn.
Reset the costs of your [gold]Sleights[/gold] this turn.
Gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-BON_MOT.title: Bon Mot
THESORCERESSMOD-TIME_JUMP.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:Draw 1 card.
|}Reset the costs of your [gold]Sleights[/gold] this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-TIME_JUMP.title: Time Jump
THESORCERESSMOD-SKILLFUL_FEINT.title: Skillful Feint
THESORCERESSMOD-THEATRICAL_BOW.descripti:
Gain 1 [gold]Vigor[/gold] for each Skill already played this turn.{InCombat:
Gain {Skills:diff()} Vigor.|}
THESORCERESSMOD-THEATRICAL_BOW.title: Theatrical Bow
THESORCERESSMOD-DEVOUR_MAGIC.description:
Enemy loses {Damage:diff()} HP.
Gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to HP lost.
THESORCERESSMOD-DEVOUR_MAGIC.title: Devour Magic
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCEROUS_PULSE.descript:
Gain {CharismaPower:diff()} [gold]Charisma[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a {IfUpgraded:show:|random }card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
The next [gold]Sorcery[/gold] you play costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCEROUS_PULSE.title: Sorcerous Pulse
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_GREATEST_LIE.descrip: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Deck[/gold] and put {Cards:plural:it|them} on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-THE_GREATEST_LIE.title: The Greatest Lie
THESORCERESSMOD-FLAMING_RUNE.description: Whenever you attack an enemy this turn, they [gold]Prime[/gold] {FlamingRunePower:diff()}.
THESORCERESSMOD-FLAMING_RUNE.title: Flaming Rune
THESORCERESSMOD-PERFECT_DISTRACTION.desc:
Discard any number of cards.
Draw cards until you have {Cards:diff()} in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-PERFECT_DISTRACTION.sele: Choose any number of cards to discard.
THESORCERESSMOD-CHAOS_SANCTUARY.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you are attacked this turn, [gold]Prime[/gold] {ChaosSanctuaryPower:diff()} in return.
THESORCERESSMOD-CHAOS_SANCTUARY.title: Chaos Sanctuary
THESORCERESSMOD-BANDIT.title: Bandit
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_DEFENSE.descr: Whenever you attack an enemy, gain {TwoWeaponDefensePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_DEFENSE.title: Two-Weapon Defense
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_FLURRY.descri: Whenever you play a Two-Weapon card, deal {TwoWeaponFlurryPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_FLURRY.title: Two-Weapon Flurry
THESORCERESSMOD-LINGERING_SHADOWS.descri: Whenever a card leaves your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], deal {LingeringShadowsPower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
THESORCERESSMOD-LINGERING_SHADOWS.title: Lingering Shadows
THESORCERESSMOD-BACKSTABBER.description: Your Attacks deal {BackstabberPower:diff()} more damage while you have [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-BACKSTABBER.title: Backstabber
THESORCERESSMOD-NIMBLE_FINGERS.descripti: The first [gold]Sleight[/gold] you play each turn doesn't increase the cost of your [gold]Sleights[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-NIMBLE_FINGERS.title: Nimble Fingers
THESORCERESSMOD-DEFENSIVE_ADVANTAGE.desc: If you end your turn with [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold], ALL enemies lose {DefensiveAdvantagePower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELISTS_PROWESS.descrip: At the start of each turn, gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-DUELISTS_PROWESS.title: Duelist's Prowess
THESORCERESSMOD-COUNTER_STEP.title: Counter-Step
THESORCERESSMOD-FIRESTARTER.description:
The first time you play a [gold]Sleight[/gold] each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} the next time you play a [gold]Sorcery[/gold].
The first time you play a [gold]Sorcery[/gold] each turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} the next time you play a [gold]Sleight[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-FIRESTARTER.title: Strike the Fire
THESORCERESSMOD-DEFENSIVE_ROLL.descripti: The next {DefensiveRollPower:plural:time|{DefensiveRollPower:diff()} times} you would lose HP, prevent it and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 5 random cards from your [gold]Draw[/gold] and [gold]Discard Piles[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-DEFENSIVE_ROLL.title: Daring Roll
THESORCERESSMOD-DETONATOR.description:
Deal damage equal to the enemy's [gold]Prime[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show: twice|}.{InCombat:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage.|}
THESORCERESSMOD-DETONATOR.title: Detonator
THESORCERESSMOD-RAVENS_SPLENDOR.title: Raven's Splendor
THESORCERESSMOD-STORYTELLERS_FORM.title: Storyteller's Form
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_MASTERY.descr: Your Two-Weapon Attacks hit {TwoWeaponMasteryPower:plural:an additional time|{TwoWeaponMasteryPower:diff()} additional times}.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_MASTERY.title: Two-Weapon Mastery
THESORCERESSMOD-PRIME_THE_FIRE.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
ALL enemies [gold]Prime[/gold] {PrimedPower:diff()}.
Next turn, play this again.
THESORCERESSMOD-PRIME_THE_FIRE.title: Prime the Fire
THESORCERESSMOD-FLAME_IN_THE_DARK.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {CharismaPower:diff()} Charisma.
If [gold]Fatal[/gold], permanently increase this [gold]Charisma[/gold] gain by {Increase:diff()}.
THESORCERESSMOD-FLAME_IN_THE_DARK.title: Flame in the Dark
THESORCERESSMOD-A_MURDER_OF_ONE.descript: If X > 1, gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
THESORCERESSMOD-A_MURDER_OF_ONE.title: A Murder of One
THESORCERESSMOD-SOUL_REBEL.title: Soul Rebel
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_PRESSURE.desc:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Shuffle [gold]Two-Weapon Opening[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-DIMENSIONAL_ASSAULT.desc:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOWSLIP.description:
All Attacks and Skills in your [gold]Hand[/gold] gain [gold]Agile[/gold] and [gold]Shadowdance[/gold], if they didn't already have them.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOWSLIP.title: Shadowslip
THESORCERESSMOD-TRANSLOCATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
Reset the costs of your [gold]Sleights[/gold] this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-TRANSLOCATE.title: Translocate
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOW_ON_THE_WALL.descr:
Gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
The next time you play an Attack, gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold] and play it again.
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOW_ON_THE_WALL.title: Shadow on the Wall
THESORCERESSMOD-FIRESWARM.description:
[gold]Prime[/gold] {PrimedPower:diff()}.
At the start of your next turn, [gold]Prime[/gold] the enemy equal to their current [gold]Primed[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-FIRESWARM.title: Fireswarm
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOWY_TENDRILS.descrip:
ALL enemies lose {Damage:diff()} HP.
ALL enemies lose {ShadowyTendrilsPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-SHADOWY_TENDRILS.title: Shadowy Tendrils
THESORCERESSMOD-TRICKSTERS_ACE.descripti: Add a random [gold]Sorcery[/gold] into your hand. It's free to play this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-TRICKSTERS_ACE.title: Trickster's Ace
THESORCERESSMOD-BURN_OUT.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card from your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-BURN_OUT.title: Burn Out
THESORCERESSMOD-SPELLBLADE.title: Spellblade
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERERS_GAMBIT.descrip: When you take no damage from an attack, deal {SorcerersGambitPower:diff()} back.
THESORCERESSMOD-SORCERERS_GAMBIT.title: Sorcerer's Gambit
THESORCERESSMOD-ELDRITCH_BLADE.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next time you play a [gold]Sorcery[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons(2)}
THESORCERESSMOD-ELDRITCH_BLADE.title: Eldritch Blade
THESORCERESSMOD-LEGENDARY_SNEAK.descript: Whenever you play a [gold]Sleight[/gold], gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-LEGENDARY_SNEAK.title: Legendary Sneak
THESORCERESSMOD-FLOCK_TACTICS.descriptio: Whenever another player attacks an enemy this turn, gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-FLOCK_TACTICS.title: Flock Tactics
THESORCERESSMOD-SPARK_STEP.title: Spark Step
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_TWIST.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Enemy loses {TwoWeaponTwistPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_TWIST.title: Two-Weapon Twist
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_PUNISH.descri:
Can only be played when you have [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_PUNISH.title: Two-Weapon Punish
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_COMBINATION.d:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage{InCombat:{hits:plural:| {hits:diff()} times}|}.
Hits an additional time for each [gold]Two-Weapon Combination[/gold] already played this combat.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_DERVISH.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {mult:diff()}X times.
Deal {bonusdamage:diff()} additional damage to ALL enemies that were hit at least once.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_DERVISH.title: Two-Weapon Dervish
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_DUELING.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {hits:diff()} times.
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Dervish+|Two-Weapon Dervish}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_DUELING.title: Two-Weapon Dueling
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_BURST.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies{hits:plural:| {hits:diff()} times}.
Next turn, return this to your hand and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] it.
Can be upgraded any number of times.
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_BURST.title: Two-Weapon Burst
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_LINK.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
Gain [gold]Combat Advantage[/gold].
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Finisher+|Two-Weapon Finisher}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_LINK.title: Two-Weapon Link
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_OPENING.descr:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Link+|Two-Weapon Link}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_OPENING.title: Two-Weapon Opening
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_CATCH.descrip:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Add [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Two-Weapon Twist+|Two-Weapon Twist}[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THESORCERESSMOD-TWO_WEAPON_CATCH.title: Two-Weapon Catch
